title: Sanguine | Blood Particles
description: A simple mod that adds blood particles when you attack
body:
## Blood!
Make your hits feel more powerful with blood particles whenever you hit something
A very simple mod for fabric adds blood particles to every hit

Created due to a lack of well maintained blood particle mods as all others seem to be abandoned and not updated to newer versions

## UPDATE!
Mobs now have unique blood types to make it make a lil more sense
![Endermen have purple blood when hit :D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a415785bdf29284fe5dd5b65f7a208e0d73c427.png)
![Squid's (and guardians) have blue blood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee0e30aa7db8b8dc48275424d7ed8e2f79539603.png)
